response_text:
# Git Branching Strategies: GitFlow vs Trunk-Based Development

## The Core Philosophy Difference

```
GitFlow: Multiple long-lived branches, structured releases
Trunk-Based: Single main branch, continuous integration
```

---

## GitFlow

### Branch Structure
```
main          в”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ (production releases)
                в”Ӯ                          в”Ӯ
develop       в”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ (integration)
                   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
feature/login в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв”ҳ         в”Ӯ              (feature branches)
                             в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ
release/1.2  в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв”ҳ              (release prep)
                                   в”Ӯ
hotfix/bug   в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹв”Җв”Җв—Ҹ           (emergency fixes)
```

### Branch Types & Rules

| Branch | Purpose | Branches From | Merges Into |
|--------|---------|--------------|-------------|
| `main` | Production code | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| `develop` | Integration branch | `main` | вҖ” |
| `feature/*` | New features | `develop` | `develop` |
| `release/*` | Release prep | `develop` | `main` + `develop` |
| `hotfix/*` | Emergency fixes | `main` | `main` + `develop` |

### GitFlow Workflow Example
```bash
# Start a feature
git checkout develop
git checkout -b feature/user-authentication

# Work on feature...
git add .
git commit -m "Add login endpoint"
git commit -m "Add JWT validation"

# Finish feature - merge back to develop
git checkout develop
git merge --no-ff feature/user-authentication
git branch -d feature/user-authentication

# Start a release
git checkout -b release/1.2.0 develop
# Fix bugs, update version numbers...
git commit -m "Bump version to 1.2.0"

# Finish release - merge to BOTH main and develop
git checkout main
git merge --no-ff release/1.2.0
git tag -
